sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khazih galkap te'n ah Galsim ding kuan un.
Eite mai a masa Zeisu mitsuan un.
Khazih eite mangpa makai hilo maw,
En un a dial paina galphual lam manawh.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Khazih galkap te'n ah Gal kapding kuan un.
Singlamteh pua unla na mailam nawt un.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zeisu min azak ciang Dawi mite tai uh,
Nawt un tua ahih ciang na mualsuah dong uh,
Phatna aw kizak ciang Dawi gam killing hi,
Lawmte tua ahih ciang Awng un phatna pi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Galkap honpi bangin Pawlpi'n masot hi,
Tang misiangte bangin i totna khat hi.
Eite kikhenlo in pumkhat bek i hi,
Lawp le zuih kikhat in hong ki-it sak hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Kumpi za sia thei hi, kumpi gam kip kei,
Hih hang Zeisu' Pawlpi cik mah'n sia thei kei.
Dawi in Pasian' Pawlpi cikciang zo ngei kei,
Khazih hong ciamsa hi, A ciam peel ngei kei.

sections.label: Verse 5
lines: Tua hi a hong pawm un mi khempeuh inah,
Ko tawh hong sakhawm un galzawh nuamna la.
Aminthang pahtawi un leitung vantungah,
Tatsat loin phatun khazih kumpipa
